---
title: "Build, Evaluate, and Improve AI That Works in Production"
subtitle: "Refined over a year of cohorts with 4,500+ engineers and PMs from OpenAI, Google, Meta, and Amazon."
sidebar: false
toc: false
image: cover.png
repo-actions: false
search: false
css: services.css
---

## The course: AI Evals For Engineers & PMs

If you're checking everything by hand and scared to ship, this course is for you. Over the cohort you will:

- Replace random spot-checking with a repeatable way to find failures.
- Design and validate LLM-as-judge and code-based evaluators that match expert judgment.
- Wire evals into CI/CD so prompt, model, and tool changes get checked before they ship.
- Run experiments that raise accuracy and cut cost.

You keep lifetime access to all recordings, a 150+ page course reader, 10+ hours of office hours, a private Discord, and a seat in every future cohort.

:::{.cta-section}
<div class="cta-option">
[See next cohort dates &amp; enroll](https://maven.com/parlance-labs/evals?promoCode=evals-info-url){.cta-button-primary role="button" target="_blank"}
<span class="cta-subtext">AI Evals For Engineers &amp; PMs · $3,150</span>
</div>

<p class="archive-note">Our 2024 talk series surveying a range of LLM topics is archived [here](education/index.qmd).</p>
:::
